name: square-time-card-manager
description: Square time card management and notification plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Current approved scope: Square-connected missed clock-out email and text workflows.
interface.longDescription: This plugin is currently scoped to approved Time Card Manager work only. The active customer-facing workflow centers on missed clock-out notifications tied to a Square connection and subscription-backed delivery settings.
defaultPrompt: Show the Square time card manager plugin.
Explain the currently approved phase 1 scope.
List the setup needs for the missed clock-out notification workflow.
